translations:
‘sie
			richteten sich übel zu mit Steinen’;

Preterit.turoyo: U zlam mpalpaxle i aṯto baq qayse (İlyas p.c)
translations:
The
			man beat up the wife with wooden sticks.

Preterit.turoyo: Lә tre zlamat mqatalle, mpalpaxxe ḥḏoḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
Two
			men fought, they beat each other up.

Infectum.turoyo: Mәd ak kalbe d kәmqatli kompalpxi ḥḏoḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
When
			the dogs fight they beat up each other.

Azzino li šuqo, ḥzeli 
			tre zlamat mpalpxiwa  ḥḏoḏe.(İlyas p.c)

Preterit.turoyo: 1.aḥ ḥәmṣe mpaxpxi ʕal u dawqo. (ilyas p.c)
translations:
Chickpeans
			burst open on a frying pan.

Infectum.turoyo: 1. Mәd až žabaš d komoṭәn komipaxpxi. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
When
			watermelons become ripe they split open/ burst.

3.
			Ag garme das sowe komipaxpxi. The bones of old people break.
			(İlyas p.c)

Preterit.turoyo: U zlam nafәl mi goro mpalpxi ag garmayḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
The
			man fell from the roof his bones broke.
